titleStmt.title: SII 22.387A: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 387A. (A.R. No. 387 A of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. ROCK-CUT ŚIVA TEMPLE-IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is built in at the beginning of lines and is also incomplete. It is a verse inscription in characters of about the 13th century A.D. It seems to be in praise of some merchant community whose members made name and money in such cities as Vāruṇāpati, Vellūr Nellūr, Kāñchī, Pūmpugār, Paḻaiyārai and Teṉ-Madurāpuri. It refers to a gift of lamp to god Śiva at Madurai (Māṉēndiya-Karamuḍai-Marudar).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—ṉūṟu koṭiyeṉṉum pāriṭaiya
—lvarāki yuṟainiṉṟa ceḻunakarkaḷittāta
—ttum vāruṇāpati vācattimayarttam
—nantavattaṉa māpotimeyār
—vellūrum nellūrum māṭa
—pāṟpāruñ cirkāñciyum pūmpukār�
—ḻaiyāṟaiyun teṉmaturāpurinakariyunta
—māṟumavai vāṇiyar kaṭaka
—ṭaiyāṟum vaṟṟāta taṟalor vāḻu�
—yāṉai ceyvāraṇamum pūtta malar�
—ṭayāṉāratu viḷaṅkun toṉṟiye
—lu matakkeruṭak koṭip pu�
—ṭaiññākameṉu muracun teṟ kamalaka
—ṉu māṇaiyum per periyatevarkaḷālu
—pareṉṟuṅ kavippareṉṟum viṉaiñare
—pariya nākareṉṟuñ cirārum perumpuvi�
—kaapparice nāṉ mukaṉṟaṉ vaittaruḷum peru
—ka veḷvaḻutiyaic ceṇṭaṭattuk kicaiyā
—m por mukavallaṉākarācaṉṟaṉai veṉṟu vi
—maṉ muṭiyil vaittoraṉpuṟṟa poṉ paṟṟiyū
—vaṉ makaṉai Eḻil vāḷiliṭaiyeṟṟār kāve
—l cempoṉ meyntor muventar pāṭal ko
—ṅ kottatār Āṉaitaṉṉai yiṭaimatittor
—r māṉentiya karamuṭaiya marutaṟku kaṭko
—pe kaṟṟār viḷakku vaittor karuppācam kaStops with this.
Digital edition of SII 22.387A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
